popularStory.headline: Scots Members of the French Nobility

The Stuarts of Darnley, seigneurs d'Aubigny

zh.Diocese of Orléans, France: 法國迪瑟 德 奧爾萊安斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Stewart 1st Seigneur d'Aubigny於1380年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾達利時，他的父親Sir Alexander Stewart 5th Laird of Darnley39歲，母親Jonetta Keith45歲。他於1406年9月23日與Elizabeth Lennox - Countess Of Lennox在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1419年登記服兵役。他於1428年被列為joint french ambassador to scotland。他去世於1429年2月12日在法國莫瑟勒賀次享年49歲，埋葬在法國迪瑟 德 奧爾萊安斯。

zh-hans.Diocese of Orléans, France: 法国迪瑟 德 奧爾萊安斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Stewart 1st Seigneur d'Aubigny于1380年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾達利时，他的父亲Sir Alexander Stewart 5th Laird of Darnley39岁，母亲Jonetta Keith45岁。他于1406年9月23日与Elizabeth Lennox - Countess Of Lennox在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1419年登记服兵役。他于1428年被列为joint french ambassador to scotland。他去世于1429年2月12日在法国莫瑟勒賀次享年49岁，埋葬在法国迪瑟 德 奧爾萊安斯。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Stewart 1st Seigneur d'Aubigny was born in 1380, in Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Alexander Stewart 5th Laird of Darnley, was 39 and his mother, Jonetta Keith, was 45. He married Elizabeth Lennox - Countess Of Lennox on 23 September 1406, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He registered for military service in 1419. In 1428, at the age of 48, his occupation is listed as joint french ambassador to scotland. He died on 12 February 1429, in Hertzing, Moselle, France, at the age of 49, and was buried in Diocese of Orléans, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Stewart 1st Seigneur d'Aubigny est né en 1380, à Darnley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Alexander Stewart 5th Laird of Darnley, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Jonetta Keith, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Lennox - Countess Of Lennox le 23 septembre 1406, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1419. En 1428, à l’âge de 48 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est joint french ambassador to scotland. Il est décédé le 12 février 1429, à Hertzing, Moselle, France, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Diocèse de Orléans, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Stewart 1st Seigneur d'Aubigny 1380 in Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alexander Stewart 5th Laird of Darnley 39 und seine Mutter Jonetta Keith 45. Er hat am 23. September 1406 in Scotland Elizabeth Lennox - Countess Of Lennox geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er hat sich 1419 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1428, als er 48 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als joint french ambassador to scotland aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. Februar 1429 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Herzing, Moselle, Frankreich und wurde in Diocèse de Orléans, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Stewart 1st Seigneur d'Aubigny è nato il nel 1380 nel Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Alexander Stewart 5th Laird of Darnley, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Jonetta Keith, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Lennox - Countess Of Lennox il 23 settembre 1406, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1419. Nel 1428, all'età di 48 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come joint french ambassador to scotland. Morì il 12 febbraio 1429, nel Hertzing, Moselle, Francia, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Diocèse de Orléans, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Stewart 1st Seigneur d'Aubignyが1380年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアダルンリーで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Stewart 5th Laird of Darnleyは39歳，母Jonetta Keithは45歳であった。1406年9月23日にスコットランドでElizabeth Lennox - Countess Of Lennoxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1419年に兵役登録をした。1428年，48歳の時，職業はjoint french ambassador to scotlandと記録されている。彼は1429年2月12日にフランスモセルハートズイングで49歳で死去し，フランスディオクeゼ ド オルルeアンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Stewart 1st Seigneur d'Aubigny(이)가 1380년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 더른리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alexander Stewart 5th Laird of Darnley(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Jonetta Keith(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1406년 9월 23일 스컷랜드에서 Elizabeth Lennox - Countess Of Lennox(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1419년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1428년, 48세의 나이로 그의 직업은 joint french ambassador to scotland이었다. 그는 1429년 2월 12일 프랑스 모셀 허치그에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 디오ce스 데 올를e아스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Stewart 1st Seigneur d'Aubigny nasceu em 1380, em Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Alexander Stewart 5th Laird of Darnley, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Jonetta Keith, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Lennox - Countess Of Lennox em 23 de setembro de 1406, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1419. Em 1428, com 48 anos, sua profissão aparece como joint french ambassador to scotland. Ele faleceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1429, em Hertzing, Moselle, França, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Diocèse de Orléans, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Stewart 1st Seigneur d'Aubigny родился в 1380 г. в местности дарнли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Alexander Stewart 5th Laird of Darnley было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Jonetta Keith, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Lennox - Countess Of Lennox 23 сентября 1406 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. В 1419 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1428 году, в возрасте 48 лет, работал по профессии joint french ambassador to scotland. Он умер 12 февраля 1429 г. в местности хирцинг, моселл, Франция в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности диокeс де орлeанс, Франция.

sm.1428-1429: mai le 1428 e o'o I le 1429

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Stewart 1st Seigneur d'Aubigny nació en 1380, en Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Alexander Stewart 5th Laird of Darnley, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Jonetta Keith, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Lennox - Countess Of Lennox el 23 de septiembre de 1406, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1419. En 1428, a la edad de 48 años, su ocupación registrada era joint french ambassador to scotland. Murió el 12 de febrero de 1429, en Hertzing, Moselle, Francia, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Diocèse de Orléans, Francia.
